# Evento Vivo Workspace Rules

- Keep repo-wide rules short and durable here.
- Put stack-specific guidance in `.github/instructions/**/*.instructions.md`.
- Treat `docs/active/<feature>/` as live feature context.
- Treat `docs/architecture/` as historical analysis and reference by default.
- Keep changes scoped to the relevant app, module, or feature folder.
- Preserve public contracts unless the task explicitly changes them.
- Do not add new dependencies or broad abstractions without justification.
- For long or ambiguous tasks, plan before editing.
- Before closing work, run the relevant validation for the touched scope.
